# Handoff: code-review -> implementation

<!-- HANDOFF_META: START -->
from: code-review
to: implementation
iteration: 1
<!-- HANDOFF_META: END -->

## Tasks

- [ ] Address the highest-priority review findings.
- [ ] Add or update tests for the reviewed behavior.
- [ ] Re-run the narrow verification command set.

## Context

This sample models the first loopback iteration where review feedback returns concrete tasks to implementation.

## Acceptance

- The review blockers are resolved.
- The follow-up tests pass.
- The plan is ready for another review pass.
